title: BARUCH HASHEM ADONAI - Dunsin Oyekan ft. @theophilussunday..
description:
In Scripture, “Blessed is He who comes in the Name of the Lord” is the cry that welcomed Jesus’ triumphant entry. It is a sound that precedes divine visitation, the proclamation that the Lord is coming into a people, a territory, a nation.

Today, Baruch Hashem Adonai is a prophetic chant released over the earth. It is not merely about the second coming of Christ, but about a present invasion — the Lord coming again and again into homes, families, churches, cities, and nations, until His will is done on earth as it is in heaven.

This is the sound of nations lifting the Name of the Lord into the atmosphere.
From continent to continent.
From family altars to townhalls.
From the rising of the sun to the setting of the same.
As we bless the Name, we make room for His reign. As we lift the cry, we announce His rule. As we sing Baruch Hashem Adonai, we declare that the King is welcome.

Let the nations resound with the cry:
Blessed be the Name of the Lord.
Baruch Hashem Adonai.

Then those who went before and those who followed cried out, saying:
“Hosanna!
‘Blessed is He who comes in the name of the Lord!’
 Blessed is the kingdom of our father David
That comes in the name of the Lord!
Hosanna in the highest!” And Jesus went into Jerusalem and into the temple. So when He had looked around at all things, as the hour was already late, He went out to Bethany with the twelve. Mark 11:9-10

Blessed be the name of the Lord
From this time forth and forevermore! Psalms 113:2

title: Grey Hulk (2026) - Dwayne Johnson, Mila Kunis, Mark Ruffalo | Concept Trailer
description:
#GreyHulk #DwayneJohnson #HarrisonFord #Hulk

Watch this fan-made Grey Hulk concept trailer

In the scorching desert sand, the U.S. military tries to play God and create something they can't even control. Dwayne Johnson brings unbridled power and intensity to Bruce Banner, a brilliant scientist who was involuntarily turned into the Grey Hulk, a gargantuan 9-foot monolith of slate grey rage and anger resulting from an untested dose of gamma radiation and military ambitions. The indomitable Harrison Ford takes command of the screen as General Thunderbolt Ross, a man consumed by the need to build the ultimate super-soldier; however, he also destroyed the life of his daughter's favorite person. Mila Kunis portrays Betty Ross, caught in a war of allegiance to her father and love for the monster he has created, courageous enough to stand against an entire army with just her arms stretched out and a breaking heart.

When Ross self-injects and becomes the Red Hulk, a blazing red nightmare that radiates heat and hate, the two titans clash in a war that shakes the very foundations of Earth. But the Multiverse had other plans. Mark Ruffalo bursts into existence across different dimensions as the Green Hulk, standing side-by-side with his grey counter-part in a battle that would be impossible for any single hero to win alone. Two Hulks fight together as one against a common enemy; punches are thrown and rocks are smashed until Red Hulk falls into a smoldering crater. As the dust settles, and the possibility of peace seems to arise, Betty cradles Bruce in her arms; however, in the shadows, the eyes of Red Hulk flicker back to life. It is clear that this war is far from being finished.

Disclaimer: This is a fan made concept trailer for entertainment purposes only. All rights to Marvel Studios, The Walt Disney Company and all of their respective copyright owners belong exclusively to them. There is no affiliation with any official production.

Along with fan-made trailers, I also share movie reviews, news, and updates from the world of entertainment. Be sure to hit that subscribe button and stay updated on all the latest from my channel!

title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

title: Fast & Furious 11 (2026) - First Trailer  | Vin Diesel, Cristiano Ronaldo, Jason Momoa
description:
#FastAndFurious11 #VinDiesel #JasonMomoa #CristianoRonaldo

Family is the legacy — and Dominic Toretto never leaves his behind.

Editing, Adobe Premiere, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by ‪‪@USTrailerStudio‬ please subscribe for more:

🎥 Attention Viewers!

This video is a fan-made cinematic concept, created for artistic expression and entertainment only. Powered by AI innovations (Google Veo 3), professional-grade sound design, and visual storytelling, it reimagines what modern filmmaking can be.
Every frame was built with creativity and passion—no official affiliation, just pure imagination.
Enjoy the experience, share the vision, and let’s keep pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in film. 🍿🎬

🚗 FAST & FURIOUS 11

FAST & FURIOUS 11 (2026) continues the legendary Fast Saga with another explosive chapter of speed, loyalty, and high-octane action. Vin Diesel returns as Dominic Toretto, the fearless street racer turned global hero who has spent a lifetime protecting the people he calls family.

As new enemies rise and old threats return, Dom and his crew must face a mission that pushes them beyond the limits of speed and sacrifice. With allies like Letty Ortiz, Deckard Shaw, and Gisele Yashar by his side, Dom prepares for the ultimate showdown against a powerful new enemy determined to destroy everything the Fast family has built.

From intense street races to globe-spanning action sequences, FAST & FURIOUS 11 brings the adrenaline-fueled energy fans love — powerful cars, breathtaking stunts, and the emotional bond that has defined the franchise for over two decades.

Driven by loyalty, courage, and the unbreakable code of family, the Fast crew faces their most dangerous road yet.

Because in Dom’s world…
family always rides together.

title: I Speak Blessings | Delana Hope (Official Video)
description:
I Speak Blessings is a declaration song.

This is not just music. This is spiritual alignment. When you declare what God says over your life, your atmosphere shifts.

In this song, I speak blessings over my home, my family, my mind, my body, my finances, and every area of my life. You are not powerless. Your words carry authority.

Proverbs 18:21 reminds us that life and death are in the power of the tongue. So today, we choose life. We choose blessing. We choose faith.

Play this in your home. Declare it out loud. Let this song become your daily confession.

Stream “I Speak Blessings” from the album Unmoved on all platforms.

Comment below: I SPEAK BLESSINGS.

Strengthen your prayer life.

I created a hub where you can download digital prayer journals and faith-centered resources to help you grow spiritually and stay rooted in prayer.

Explore the Zion Pearl store:

https://zionpearl.com

title: From: Season 4 Exclusive Trailer (2026) Harold Perrineau, Catalina Sandino Moreno
description:
Created by John Griffin (Crater) and executive produced by Griffin, showrunner Jeff Pinkner (Lost, Alias, Fringe) and director Jack Bender (Lost, Game of Thrones, The Institute), the series unravels the mystery of a nightmarish town that traps all those who enter. The new season will premiere Sunday, April 19 on MGM+.

In Season Four, the closer the residents of town get to the answers they seek, the more terrifying their search becomes. Who is the Man in Yellow, and what does he want? Will Jade and Tabitha’s revelation be the key to finally going home? How much longer can Boyd hold the town together, even as his body and mind are falling apart? And what role will the town’s most recent arrival play in the events to come? Season Four will open doors that some in town will end up wishing had remained closed.

The series stars Harold Perrineau (Lost) and an ensemble cast which includes Catalina Sandino Moreno (Maria Full of Grace, The Affair), Eion Bailey (Band of Brothers), Hannah Cheramy (Under Wraps, Van Helsing), Simon Webster (Strays), Ricky He (The Good Doctor), Chloe Van Landschoot (Charity, Skin), Corteon Moore (Utopia Falls), Pegah Ghafoori (The Perfect Wedding), David Alpay (Castle Rock), Elizabeth Saunders (Clarice), Avery Konrad (Honor Society), Scott McCord (East of Middle West), Nathan D. Simmons (Diggstown, This Hour Has 22 Minutes), Kaelen Ohm (Hit & Run, Eumenides Falls), Angela Moore (A Series of Unfortunate Events, Maid), A.J. Simmons (Reacher), Julia Doyle (Astrid And Lilly Save The World), Robert Joy (CSI: NY) and Samantha Brown (Y: The Last Man).

title: Mortal Kombat II | Official Trailer II
description:
The wait is almost over! Mortal Kombat II arrives in theaters and IMAX May 8. #MortalKombatMovie #FilmedForIMAX

From New Line Cinema comes the latest high-stakes installment in the blockbuster video game franchise in all its brutal glory, Mortal Kombat II. This time, the fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

Karl Urban stars as Johnny Cage, alongside Adeline Rudolph, Jessica McNamee, Josh Lawson, Ludi Lin, Mehcad Brooks, Tati Gabrielle, Lewis Tan, Damon Herriman, with Chin Han, Tadanobu Asano as Lord Raiden, Joe Taslim as Bi-Han, and Hiroyuki Sanada as Hanzo Hasashi and Scorpion.

Director Simon McQuoid returns to helm the follow up to his explosive 2021cinematic adventure, from a screenplay by Jeremy Slater, based on the videogame created by Ed Boon and John Tobias. The film is produced by Todd Garner, E. Bennett Walsh, James Wan, Toby Emmerich and Simon McQuoid, and executive produced by Michael Clear, Judson Scott, Jeremy Slater, Ed Boon and Lawrence Kasanoff.

Joining McQuoid behind the camera are director of photography Stephen F. Windon, production designer Yohei Taneda, editor Stuart Levy and costume designer Cappi Ireland, with casting by Rich Delia and music by Benjamin Wallfisch. 

New Line Cinema Presents an Atomic Monster/Broken Road Production, a Fireside Films Production, Mortal Kombat II. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX® across North America on May 8, 2026, and internationally beginning 6 May 2026.
